newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The February 2026 capital-acceleration update and maintained FY EBITDAF guidance (NZ$490m-520m) predate the window; only a +3.59% drift, no identifiable catalyst.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling/power-demand lens: NZ utility with no AI-specific data-center power catalyst since June 9. Generic electricity exposure, no new evidence; +3.59% is benign drift. Hold the long tail.
verdicts.bull: Diversified NZ generation (1200MW Huntly + hydro/wind) gives baseload power-demand optionality if AI electricity load broadens.
verdicts.neutral: Stable regulated utility; no AI-specific demand signal, consensus rating is Hold.
verdicts.bear: No data-center/AI catalyst; NZ-domestic demand and hydrology drive earnings, weak fit for a scaling watchlist.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Broad electricity-demand growth from compute load.
verdicts.primaryRisk: No direct AI exposure; NZ regulatory/hydrology sensitivity.
